title: Support services | NHSScotland Careers
content:
Home
Explore careers
Support services
Support services
Support services play an important role in the running of the health service in Scotland. There are lots of opportunities to develop your career in a range of roles.
Catering assistant
Domestic assistant
Domestic supervisor
Electrician
Laundry assistant
Mechanical engineer
Plumber
Porter
Portering supervisor
Security officer
Security Supervisor
Learning for Career Success
Learning for Career Success is an online career planning resource for the support workforce. It will help you find work-based learning opportunities to enhance your career.
Find out more
NHSScotland Careers blog
Our blog features how-to guides, case studies, and resources for career planning, researching roles, and discovering what it's like to work in the NHS.
Discover more
